EmailTemplate.description: Email to be used when a policy needs to be cancelled and re-set up and has been paid for using a single payment.
EmailTemplate.name: Cancel Re-Set Up Email (Single Payment)
EmailTemplate.subject: Your Refund
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
You recently got in touch to make a change to your policy. In order to action this change, we had to cancel your original policy and re-set this up with your requested amends - as a result of this, you are owed a refund.
Your refund
As you paid in a single payment, a pro-rata refund of £XXX will appear in the account from which you originally paid in the next 3 to 10 working days.
If you have any further queries, please feel free to contact us on 01242 808740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Service Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
